segments.text: Yaura's reading that DI really well though.
segments.original_text: Yaura選手もね、ベク変とかしっかり見てるんですけどね。

segments.text: Here Ryuk manages to push the line up,
segments.original_text: ここはラインをリュークが押し上げることに成功して、

segments.text: charges in, clips the platform, and loses all the momentum,
segments.original_text: 駆け上がり、コマに当たってしまい、ジャンプが潰れて、

full_text: Yaura's reading that DI really well though. Here Ryuk manages to push the line up, charges in, clips the platform, and loses all the momentum,
